items.title: Jamie Dimon says Trump’s $5 billion JPMorgan Chase lawsuit has ‘no merit,’ but admits he’d be angry about debanking too
items.description: The JPMorgan Chase CEO blamed regulatory pressure for forcing banks to close controversial accounts.

items.title: Jamie Dimon warns Coinbase must play by same rules as JPMorgan or the ‘public will pay’
items.description: JPMorgan Chase CEO says crypto companies should be regulated like banks if they want to pay stablecoin rewards. Banking executives and crypto firms are debating a market structure bill. Dimon added that the bank is a big user of blockchain technology.
